parameters.content:
## Sitemap
 Extracts URLs from a site’s sitemap.xml and validates that each URL is active.
There are multiple filters available in the Sets Inputs node to help refine what data is collected during a run.

allowedSubdomains
Only crawl specific subdomains (instead of all).
https://nasa.gov/
→ science.nasa.gov, nasa.gov,

blockedSubdomains
Crawl all subdomains except those listed.
https://nasa.gov/
→ plus.nasa.gov

allowedSections
Only crawl URLs containing specified path segments.
https://nps.gov/subjects/fossils/
→ fossils, articles

blockedSections
Crawl all sections except those containing specified path segments.
https://ready.gov/
→ ar,es,fr,ht,ja,ko,ru,tl,vi,zh-hans,hi,pt-br,
